resource_1_description: Money: the more you have, the better!
resource_2_description: Wood is a resource used to build structures.
resource_3_description: Stone is a resource used to build structures.
resource_4_description: Iron is a resource used to build structures.
resource_6_description: XP is a resource used to level up the player.
resource_7_description: Energy is a resource used to play the game.
resource_8_description: Bronze Dragoon is a unit that can be trained in the Barracks.
resource_9_description: Silver Dragoon is a unit that can be trained in the Barracks.
resource_10_description: Gold Dragoon is a unit that can be trained in the Barracks.
unit_1_description: Just a peasant with a pike
unit_2_description: Cheap hired blade with his own arms
unit_3_description: Agile scout skilled in forest navigation
unit_4_description: Mystic wielding the power of the heavy clouds
building_2_description: Train your basic melee infantry here.
building_3_description: Simple housing to keep the wind and rain off.
building_5_description: Produce food and resources for your people.
building_6_description: A holy place for healing and spiritual growth.
building_13_description: Resurrect and manage your mighty heroes.
building_14_description: Trade resources and items to grow your kingdom.
building_7_description: Provides vision and defensive fire against invaders.
building_8_description: Secure storage for your kingdom's most precious treasures.
building_9_description: Where the finest arms and armor are forged.
building_10_description: Extracts iron and other valuable minerals from the earth.
building_11_description: Lodging for woodcutters to harvest timber efficiently.
building_12_description: Site for extracting high-quality stone for construction.
character_1_description: A noble knight dedicated to the realm.
character_2_description: A dark sorcerer seeking to enslave the fallen.
campaign_quote_1_quote: It's quiet as the grave - no birdsong, no voices... Something is wrong here... Keep alert!
campaign_quote_2_quote: Behold, a soldier of the ancient Legion! Something evil has invoked the fallen warrior with dark magic. We have to grant the poor wretch peace.
campaign_quote_3_quote: Necromancer! I feel the evil oozing from him. We'll put an end his unholy crimes!
campaign_quote_4_quote: Ah, sssir Roland, a noble catch! Mistress ssshall be glad... Come meet hilt of my ssscythe...
campaign_quote_6_quote: You threaten me, a ssservant of the great Morgana? Pathetic mortal! WARRIORSSS OF THE LEGION! ARISE!
campaign_quote_7_quote: Farewell, fool. Death has come to claim you!
campaign_quote_8_quote: The Necromancer fled! I doubt for long, however...
quest_1_description: Milord, messengers bring disturbing news: there is something amiss in the surrounding lands. I am willing to take to the road and find out what is afoot.
quest_2_description: Your soldiers fight and bleed for you. Build a Pavillion so they can recover after long marches and hard battles.
quest_task_1_description: Select battle 'Patrol' on the map of Greenmeere
quest_task_2_description: Select battle 'Patrol' on the map of Greenmeere
quest_task_3: Place a Pavillion on your lands
quest_task_3_description: Go to Shop and click on the right tab
